bug.description: magic number used without symbolic constant making intent unclear and maintenance error-prone

prompt:
There is a magic number used without symbolic constant making intent unclear and maintenance error-prone downstream of function nr_rrc_set_sib1_timers_and_constants in the openair2/RRC/NR_UE subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/RRC/NR_UE/rrc_timers_and_constants.c:415.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
